welcomeMessage: Hi! Welcome to Atlanta Family Law Group. I can help with practice area questions, scheduling a consultation, fees, or office information. How can I assist you?

quickPrompts.label: Consultation cost
quickPrompts.question: How much does a consultation cost?

quickPrompts.label: Custody cases
quickPrompts.question: Do you handle child custody cases?

responses.divorce|separation|filing: We handle all aspects of divorce including contested, uncontested, mediation, and high-asset cases. Attorney Williams offers a free 30-minute initial consultation. Would you like to schedule one?
responses.custody|child|visitation: Child custody is one of our primary practice areas. We handle both initial custody arrangements and modifications. Every case starts with a free consultation. Want to book one?
responses.cost|fee|price|how much|consult: Our initial consultation is free — 30 minutes with Attorney Williams. After that, fees depend on case complexity. Most family law matters work on a retainer basis. We can discuss specifics during your consultation.
responses.hours|open: Our office is open Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM. We also offer evening appointments on Tuesdays and Thursdays by request.
responses.location|address|where: We're at 1234 Peachtree Street NE, Suite 400, Atlanta, GA 30309. Free parking in the building garage.
responses.how long|timeline|duration: Every case is different. Uncontested divorces typically take 30-60 days. Contested cases can take 6-12 months. We'll give you a realistic timeline during your consultation.
responses.payment|pay|finance: We accept all major credit cards and offer payment plans for qualified clients. We can discuss fee arrangements during your free consultation.
responses.experience|qualified|background: Attorney Williams has 15 years of experience in family law with over 500 cases resolved. She's a member of the Georgia Bar Association and the American Academy of Matrimonial Lawyers.

fallback: For the most accurate answer to your specific situation, I'd recommend scheduling a free consultation with Attorney Williams. She can address everything in detail. Want me to book that?
